backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the asset management backend with functions to submit, update, delete, and query assets, including aggregations by category and condition per location.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: fixing the camera/photo capture button wiring in PhotoUpload and AssetEntryForm, and fixing the GPS capture flow to await coordinates before building the submission payload.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, utilities, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the viewport meta tag, page title 'Inventory Asset Verification', and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with three routes (/, /entry, /admin), wraps them in the Layout shell, and adds a Toaster and AddToHomeScreenPrompt.
frontend/src/components/AddToHomeScreenP: Displays a dismissible bottom-sheet prompt instructing iOS and Android users how to add the app to their home screen, shown once after a short delay on mobile devices not already in standalone mode.
frontend/src/components/AssetEntryForm.t: Full asset verification form component handling field validation, manual GPS pre-capture, photo uploads, and submission to the backend or offline queue, with distinct loading states for GPS capture and form submission.
frontend/src/components/AssetFilters.tsx: Renders a filter panel for assets with search, location, condition dropdown, and date range inputs, plus a clear-all button when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/AssetTable.tsx: Displays a paginated list (20 items) of assets as clickable cards showing thumbnail, ID, condition badge, location, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/GPSDisplay.tsx: Renders GPS coordinates in either compact inline or full card format, with accuracy info and a Google Maps link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header, bottom navigation bar (Verify Asset / Dashboard), and offline sync indicator.
frontend/src/components/OfflineSyncIndic: Shows online/offline status and pending sync count, with buttons to trigger or retry sync using the useOfflineSync hook.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: Handles photo capture and gallery selection with separate hidden inputs, compresses images, and displays a removable photo grid up to a configurable max.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a static list of asset category options with id, name, and emoji icon, plus a helper to look up a category name by id.
frontend/src/constants/locations.ts: Defines a static list of location options with id, name, and address, plus a helper to look up a location name by id.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: React hook that wraps the browser Geolocation API, exposing a `capture` function that returns a promise with latitude, longitude, and accuracy, plus loading/error state and a `reset` helper.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context/hook providing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, clear, identity, and status state to the component tree through an `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: React hook that manages offline queue synchronization, tracking online status and automatically flushing queued asset checks to the backend actor when connectivity is restored.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of TanStack Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for fetching, mutating, and deleting assets, including queries for category/location counts and CSV export.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, configuring Tailwind with a deep-slate/amber industrial OKLCH color theme, touch-target sizing, and utility component classes like status badges.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying a filterable, sortable asset table with a detail drawer showing photos and metadata, plus delete confirmation and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AssetEntryPage.tsx: Simple page component that renders a header and the `AssetEntryForm` for field technicians to submit physical asset verification entries.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for AssetVerify app showing a hero section, quick-action links to the asset entry form and admin dashboard, and a feature highlights grid (GPS, photo, offline, tamper-proof).
frontend/src/services/offlineQueue.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed queue of asset verification submissions for offline use, providing add, getAll, remove, count, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions to convert Asset records to RFC 4180-compliant CSV format and trigger a browser file download named with today's date.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility functions to convert bigint nanosecond timestamps (from the backend) into human-readable date, time, and datetime strings, plus helpers to convert Date objects to nanoseconds.
frontend/src/utils/imageCompression.ts: Compresses and resizes an image File using an HTML canvas, returning a base64 JPEG string with configurable max dimensions and quality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (amber, slate, semantic tokens), custom fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the AssetVerify app's features, architectural notes, known issues, and versioned feature list for build planning and tracking.
